highlights.description: Astro migration with content collections for markdown-based articles
Four new framework articles: Loop Engineering, Spec-Driven Development, LLM-as-a-Judge, DORA and SPACE in the AI Age
Three new case studies: Spotify Honk, Cursor/Anysphere, GitHub Copilot Workspace

added.description: Loop Engineering framework covering Claude Code /goal and /loop, Codex CLI /goal, and REAL/VEAL loop patterns
Spec-Driven Development framework comparing GitHub SpecKit, AWS Kiro, AI-DLC, OpenSpec, and VisionSpec
LLM-as-a-Judge framework for automated code review at scale with multi-judge aggregation
DORA and SPACE in the AI Age framework with AI-native metrics
Spotify Honk case study: background agents at enterprise scale
Cursor/Anysphere case study: vibe coding at scale
GitHub Copilot Workspace case study: spec-driven workflows
StrongDM Software Factory case study for ASDM Level 6
GitHub Actions workflow for docs deployment
Products section to about page
ROADMAP.md for tracking framework development progress
